subject: fix(ui): restructure header to prevent filter/title overlap
body:
Remove ALPHA badge and reset button to reclaim header space. Replace
small search icon with a flex-fill search button between the title and
filters. All header elements now live in a single flex row via
headerTitle (headerRight is null) so they never overlap.

- Search button: flex:1, fills gap between "FuelHunt" and fuel filter
- Filter buttons: smaller padding and maxWidth (56px text, 11px font)
- Reset button: removed — filters can be changed directly
- ALPHA badge: removed per user request
- headerTitleContainerStyle: flex:1 so the row spans full header width

Tags: ui, layout, header, search
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-layout
Semver: patch
